svg.title: Mission control — live agent fleet
svg.desc: Animated ASCII mission-control panel: four agents (planner, executor, critic, verifier) run with spinners and progress bars, a task token travels the plan-exec-crit-vrfy-ship pipeline with a feedback loop, a task queue equalizer pulses, and an event log streams routing, test, review and ship events.

text.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'DejaVu Sans Mono', 'Liberation Mono', monospace
